name: ASMT-10 GST Scrutiny Notice Analysis
description: Extracts key data from GST ASMT-10 scrutiny notices for drafting a formal reply.

checks.focus: Extract GSTIN, legal name, and tax period under scrutiny
checks.rule: Identify the taxpayer's GSTIN, legal name, and the specific tax period (month/quarter/year) covered by this scrutiny notice.

checks.focus: Identify discrepancies flagged by the officer
checks.rule: List all specific discrepancies mentioned — between GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B, ITC mismatches, turnover differences, etc.

checks.focus: Extract specific questions or information sought
checks.rule: List all specific questions asked or documents/clarifications requested by the proper officer.
Identify the deadline by which the taxpayer must submit their reply/clarification to the scrutiny notice.

checks.focus: Identify the proper officer details and jurisdiction
checks.rule: Extract the name, designation, and jurisdiction of the proper officer who issued the scrutiny notice.
